element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Combat mechanics established through gameplay progression
Pattern recognition and mastered combat skills

typical_relief_triggers: Safe platforming sections between enemy waves
Reduced enemy density in specific zones
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Very hard difficulty with escalating challenge across 15 levels; relentless action punctuated by brief respite moments

difficulty_curve.early_game: Moderate introduction to mechanics with manageable enemy density and platforming challenges
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased complexity with combined enemy encounters and precision platforming sections
difficulty_curve.late_game: Very hard challenges with demanding boss patterns and intricate level design
notable_spikes: Final levels integrating all learned mechanics

notable_level_patterns.description: Game structured as 15 sequentially-ordered levels (0-14) with level select accessibility, suggesting each level introduces or reinforces specific gameplay elements
Based on C64 version; level design inherited from source material with NES technical constraints applied
